description_long: This is a square, open-topped fence structure constructed from interwoven wooden slats, forming a basket-like appearance. The vertical posts are evenly spaced and support a series of horizontal rails that undulate slightly, creating a wavy, rustic pattern. The wood appears untreated or lightly finished, giving it a natural, earthy brown color with visible grain and texture. The base is reinforced with a flat wooden frame, providing stability and a defined boundary at the bottom. The top edge of the fence is irregular, with the vertical posts extending slightly above the horizontal rails, contributing to a handcrafted look. There are no visible gates, hinges, or decorative embellishments, emphasizing a utilitarian and robust design.
description: A square, woven wooden fence with a basket-like, rustic appearance and an open top. The structure features undulating horizontal rails and protruding vertical posts, with a natural brown finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the square shape, interwoven wooden slats, and the irregular top edge with vertical posts extending above the rails.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the same woven pattern and the depth of the structure, with the vertical posts and rails clearly visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the consistent basket-weave design and the sturdy wooden base frame.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, emphasizing the open interior and the natural wood texture.
